primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
note: a=126 is the neutron magic number for the last known stable nuclear shell. 9|126 (126=14*9) gives it Satellite and Singularity access; it is the only nuclear magic number in {8,20,28,50,82,126,184} with this property. All others are coprime to 3.
